markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Gather user feedback to inform future content and product strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The "systems, not software" framework is the core value.** It provides a durable, process-based approach that avoids the obsolescence of rigid, feature-disabled agency tools like WPP Open.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [**Content priorities are deep dives and tactical demos.** A 6-week cohort course is preferred over bite-sized videos, alongside continued hands-on demos, artifacts, and interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [**The framework delivers superior results.** Applying the process yielded a high-quality consumer guide for a client, a noticeable improvement over standard 800-word articles.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [**A key opportunity is corporate training.** Andrew will recommend the program to WPP APAC leadership, highlighting a need for training that avoids "micro-credentialing" in favor of foundational principles.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)

## Topics

### User Context & Motivation

  - [**Role:** SEO specialist at WPP (20+ years experience).](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Motivation:** Career "future-proofing" and curiosity about AI's potential for quality work, not just spam.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [**Discovery:** Found growthx.ai via a YouTube interview with the founder of Scrunch while researching AI measurement solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### The "Systems, Not Software" Framework

  - [**Core Insight:** The framework provides a durable, process-based approach that avoids the rapid obsolescence of rigid, feature-disabled agency tools.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [**WPP Context:** Andrew's team faces pressure to use the internal tool, WPP Open, which is seen as a "scrap heap within two years."](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [**Team Experiment:** Andrew runs an experimental content group using Claude and Co-pilot (with GPT-5) to build a business case for a more flexible, process-driven approach.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### Content & Product Feedback

  - [**Most Valuable Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
      - [Hands-on demos and shared artifacts (checklists, templates).](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [Strategic interviews (e.g., Scrunch founder).](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
      - [The exploratory, non-prescriptive tone.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [**Content Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [**Deep Dives:** A 6-week cohort course is preferred over bite-sized videos.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [**Technical Topics:** Command-line interface (CLI) integration.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
      - [**Strategic Topics:** Measurement solutions (e.g., Evertune) and research sprints.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

### Impact & Corporate Opportunity

  - [**Project Success:** Applying the framework produced a high-quality "consumer guide to EV tyres" for a client, a noticeable qualitative improvement over standard articles.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [**Corporate Training Opportunity:**](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
      - [Andrew will recommend the program as mandatory training for the WPP APAC team.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [**Key Need:** Training focused on foundational principles, not "micro-credentialing."](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
      - [**Stakeholders:** Andrew has access to key decision-makers, including the Managing Director.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andrew:**](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
      - [Recommend growthx.ai's program to WPP APAC leadership as mandatory training.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1327.0)
  - [**growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [Explore a 6-week cohort course.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
      - [Create content on CLI integration and AI measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
      - [Develop a corporate training offering focused on foundational principles.](https://fathom.video/share/7ZJ4B3KK4R3LH431PzMqxTWJ3nBTd1EF?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
